name: NI006
summary: Recombinant human anti-ATTR monoclonal antibody developed to deplete cardiac transthyretin amyloid deposits.
mechanism_summary: Targets transthyretin amyloid and is intended to promote removal of deposited ATTR by phagocytic immune cells.

open_questions: Whether apparent amyloid-load biomarker reduction leads to functional or outcome benefit
Whether chronic antibody-mediated ATTR depletion is safe in larger and longer trials
